cases.title: Maintenance window (UTC+8)
cases.note: Inline shows your local time with your TZ once at end of range. Tooltip shows each server's wall-clock.

cases.description_before: Event begins after maintenance, runs until server reset:
cases.note: Start gets your TZ (EDT), end gets "(server)" so both labels are shown.

cases.title: Raw text with start and end
cases.note: Inline text should stay exactly as provided. Tooltip should still be built from the datetime parameters.

cases.title: Raw text for a single time and with a server filter
cases.note: Inline text should remain raw, and the tooltip should be limited to the specified server.

cases.title: Cross-year range (Dec 2025 - Jan 2026)
cases.note: Year shown on both because they differ.

cases.title: Same-day in source TZ (may cross midnight in your TZ)
US DST ends during the displayed span
cases.description_before: Overnight maintenance around the fall clock change:
cases.note: In a U.S. browser timezone that observes DST, the localized inline output may need different timezone labels on each side of the span, such as EDT then EST.
